title: Ad Astra: Per Spatium Et Tempus
description: An Addon for Ad Astra and Stellaris improving space exploration by adding new structures.
body:
# Ad Astra : Per Spatium Et Tempus

## An addon for Ad Astra and Stellaris adding new structures to improve space exploration.

**This mod supports both Ad Astra and Stellaris, when choosing the file check for which mod it is compatible with.**

![Per Spatium Et Tempus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8f64277b048b74e029bf16de8dd94068b0dc7e0_0.webp)

To the Stars through space and time!




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Mod Structures :



Ruined Space Center :
![Ruined Space Center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0660d8df9a13340ce962199470e7c47ffdc0454c_0.webp)


Radio Tower :
![Radio Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e697cbea725976eefe5912c27422e04436957049_0.webp)


Stone Fortress :
![Stone Fortress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2ba0455c77f9f6b2d588143e0096122a0c47424_0.webp)


Venera lander :
![Venera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aac7de8ca1e61596b8200b1a4ce7dff567dbecee_0.webp)


Mercury fortress :
![Mercury Fortress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01ad1a595c2fa1f239e52480fa0f434c548b0577_0.webp)


Glacian Peak :
![Glacian Peak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a0ee7406ef81d0454a2ce8bdfd4edeb350dad4c_0.webp)

-> Shader is AstraLex by LexBoosT



More structures are comming soon!

</details>





For questions, suggestions or anything : Discord : roi_pasteque

You are welcome to include this mod in your modpack, no need for credit or permission
